name: react-vite
description: React 19 + Vite + TypeScript with @ait-co/devtools wired in. Default scaffold for Apps in Toss mini-apps.

app_name.description: Human-readable app name shown in UI / metadata. Default: input verbatim.

package_name.description: npm-compatible package name (kebab-case, lowercase). Default: app_name slugified.

substitute._comment: Files in which {{tokens}} should be replaced. Token-free files are not listed.
